pathology_flags.notes: Mild widening of sulci is noted, suggestive of mild cerebral atrophy.

global_impression: This sagittal T1-weighted MRI demonstrates mild cerebral atrophy, evidenced by mildly widened sulci. The visualized white matter, gray matter, cerebellum, and brainstem appear unremarkable. No acute intracranial pathology is identified.
